body:
@trontrytel is having convergence issues in the `PhaseEquil_pθq` when adding ice in TRMM. This PR exposes the numerical method so that she can try out RegulaFalsi method, which [has better convergence properties](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/previews/PR1885/DevDocs/Common/Thermodynamics/Thermodynamics/).

cc @tapios
title: Expose numerical method type to PhaseEquil_pθq constructor
